name: jpyc-agent
description: Connect Claude Code to the OAuth-protected JPYC Agent MCP endpoint for wallet inspection, JPYC transfers, and contract workflows on Polygon.

interface.shortDescription: Use JPYC agent wallet, transfer, and contract workflows from Claude Code.
defaultPrompt: Use JPYC Agent MCP to check my wallet list and balance.
Use JPYC Agent MCP to prepare a JPYC transfer quote before any state-changing action.
Use JPYC Agent MCP to inspect a contract and only propose write actions after quoting.
